headline: Domino's® Adds Parmesan Stuffed Crust to Its Best Deal Ever Just in Time for Soccer's Biggest Matches
summary: Domino's Pizza Inc. (Nasdaq: DPZ) is turning up the value in time for soccer's biggest matchups of the year. The brand's "Best Deal Ever" is now even better, with Parmesan Stuffed Crust joining the lineup without an additional charge – giving customers any pizza made with any crust and any toppings for $9.99 each, now through July 26.

content.title: Domino's® Adds Parmesan Stuffed Crust to Its Best Deal Ever Just in Time for Soccer's Biggest Matches
content.summary: Domino's Pizza Inc. (Nasdaq: DPZ) is turning up the value in time for soccer's biggest matchups of the year. The brand's "Best Deal Ever" is now even better, with Parmesan Stuffed Crust joining the lineup without an additional charge – giving customers any pizza made with any crust and any toppings for $9.99 each, now through July 26.

thumbnail.caption: Domino's is keeping its same iconic logo that customers know and love, but the brand is updating its colors to more vibrant shades of blue and red.
